creator: andrew@netplex.net
text:
I have the same problem (using 7.2 RELEASE).
FreeBSD will not see my Seagate ST1 microdrive.

Using Supermicro P4SGE with ICH4 and PATA.
IDE/CF adapter.
Seagate ST625211CF disk.
The BIOS sees the disk.
FreeBSD sees the IDE (and boots from the CD) but will not see the disk.

I can boot, install, and Debian Linux with the ST1 disk...no problem...

I can use an old 1G CF card with FreeBSD and that works.

-- 
   Andrew Lindh
  andrew@netplex.net
NETPLEX 860-233-1111
